svg.title: Chapter 17 Gate 1 wall-clock figure
svg.desc: A log-scale p50 latency dumbbell for sequential versus chunked execution and a paired median speedup confidence-interval plot for the Gate 1 six-host wall-clock matrix.
svg.text: Source workers-dev-external-multihost6-distinct • 6 distinct hosts • 8/8 primary cells pass
Median speedups span 11.785x–21.62x; minimum CI lows stay at 11.365x and +3561 ms
Sequential versus chunked medians on a log-scale millisecond axis
Paired median speedup with 95% bootstrap confidence intervals
